name: dano-recording-pi-runtime
description: Long-lived Pi runtime for Dano recording V3

scripts.check: node --check src/dano_recording/pi/runtime/profile.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/pi/runtime/protocol.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/pi/runtime/sidecar.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/pi/runtime/tools.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/_resources/js_analysis/ast_enum_extractor.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/_resources/js_analysis/sourcemap_loader.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/_resources/js_analysis/worker.mjs && node --check src/dano_recording/_resources/browser/component_probe.js && node --check src/dano_recording/_resources/browser/mutation_observer.js && node --check src/dano_recording/_resources/browser/recorder.js
